description: Declarative progression rules (§5.14). Spec canon (linear, double, percent, custom) plus common named schemes; params carry the rule's parameters. An opaque script is a separate non-normative escape hatch (§5.14).

tokens.label: Linear
tokens.description: Add a fixed increment per period (e.g. +2.5 kg/session).

tokens.label: Double Progression
tokens.description: Increase reps within a window, then add load and reset reps.

tokens.label: Percentage
tokens.description: Advance by a percentage of a threshold (e.g. %1RM waves).

tokens.label: Wave Loading
tokens.description: Cyclic up/down loading within and across sessions.

tokens.label: Autoregulated
tokens.description: Advance by readiness/RPE rather than a fixed rule.

tokens.label: Step Loading
tokens.description: Hold a load for N sessions, then step up.

tokens.label: Deload
tokens.description: A planned reduction in load/volume for recovery.

tokens.label: Custom
tokens.description: A bespoke rule; pair with an opaque script where needed (§5.14).
